name: Love's Travel Stop #301
description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-90 Exit 2 with roughly 85 truck parking spaces, 8 diesel lanes, showers, a CAT Scale, and an on-site Carl's Jr.

name: Flying J Travel Center #639
description: Pilot Flying J travel plaza at I-90 Exit 2 with about 100 truck parking spaces, diesel lanes, showers, a CAT Scale, and a convenience store/restaurant.

name: CAT Scale - Love's Travel Stop #301
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Love's Travel Stop on I-90 Exit 2 in Post Falls.

name: CAT Scale - Flying J Travel Center #639
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Flying J travel plaza on I-90 Exit 2 in Post Falls.

name: Junction Quick Stop
description: Small 24-hour Conoco truck stop about a mile south of I-90 Exit 34 with 24-hour diesel, a deli, and truck parking on a paved, lighted lot.

name: Love's Truck Care - Post Falls
description: Love's Truck Care shop at the Post Falls Love's (I-90 Exit 2) offering tire service, light mechanical repair, and 24-hour roadside assistance.

name: A1 Truck Wash
description: Truck and RV wash on W 5th Ave near I-90 Exit 2 in Post Falls (also listed as Splash-N-Dash / Classic Truck RV Wash at the same address).

name: Jim's Towing & Truck Repair
description: Mobile truck repair, heavy-duty towing, and 24-hour roadside service covering I-90 through the Silver Valley in northern Idaho.

name: Huetter Port of Entry
description: Idaho Transportation Department commercial-vehicle port of entry/weigh station on I-90 eastbound near milepost 8, about two miles west of Coeur d'Alene, with weigh-in-motion bypass.

name: Huetter Rest Area (Westbound)
description: I-90 westbound rest area near milepost 8 with separate truck parking and restrooms; ITD has flagged full closure for reconstruction beginning summer 2026, so confirm status before relying on it.

name: Huetter Welcome Center (Eastbound)
description: I-90 eastbound welcome center/rest area near milepost 8 with separate truck and passenger parking and restrooms; subject to the same 2026 reconstruction closure, so verify before use.
